title: Delicious Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with tender lamb, rich spices, and sweet dried fruits. This flavorful dish is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.

ingredients.name: tagine spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb pieces in batches until they're nicely browned, about 5 minutes per batch.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set it aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and cook the chopped onion until it's softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the tagine spice mix and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the browned lamb back into the pot, along with the chopped apricots and honey.
Pour in the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake the tagine for 2-1/2 to 3 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Season the tagine with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the tagine over couscous or rice, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
